[File: 'src/libraries/UtilsLib.sol -> Scope: Medium Fee mis-accounting where settlement fee or continuous fee is overclaimed, underclaimed, unclaimable, or charged to the wrong side'] [Function: mulDivDown / take] Can an unprivileged taker, under a buy offer (offer.buy=true) with units=1 and a non-zero settlementFee, trigger take() such that mulDivDown(units, buyerPrice, WAD) == mulDivDown(units, sellerPrice, WAD), causing claimableSettlementFee[loanToken] += 0 despite a non-zero _settlementFee, violating the invariant that every take with non-zero settlement fee must accrue a positive claimableSettlementFee, causing scoped impact: settlement fee undercollected (zero fee accrued for non-zero fee market)?
